# CloudHoste

> Secure, GDPR-compliant SSD Cloud Hosting & High-Performance European Servers.

CloudHoste provides fast, reliable, and scalable web hosting, SSD VPS servers, WordPress managed hosting, and self-hosted n8n automation infrastructure hosted in low-latency European data centers with 24/7 expert support and 99.9% uptime.

## Core Products & Services

- [Managed WordPress Hosting](https://cloudhoste.eu/wp-hosting.html): High-speed WordPress hosting with automated updates, staging environments, free SSL, and LiteSpeed caching.
- [Web Hosting](https://cloudhoste.eu/web-hosting.html): Affordable shared web hosting starting from €2.95/mo with cPanel control panel, unmetered bandwidth, and daily backups.
- [SSD VPS Hosting](https://cloudhoste.eu/vps-hosting.html): High-performance KVM SSD virtual private servers with full root access, low latency, and instant provisioning starting from €5.00/mo.
- [n8n Workflow Hosting](https://cloudhoste.eu/n8n-hosting.html): Pre-configured, self-hosted n8n workflow automation servers with dedicated resources and infinite execution capabilities.
- [Domain Registration & Transfer](https://cloudhoste.eu/domain.html): Register and transfer domain names with competitive pricing and DNS management.

## Technical Specifications & Infrastructure

- **Locations**: Tier-3 European Data Centers (Germany, Italy, Netherlands).
- **Compliance**: 100% GDPR-compliant data storage and privacy controls.
- **Hardware**: High-frequency CPUs, enterprise NVMe SSD storage arrays, and redundant 10Gbps uplinks.
- **Security**: DDoS protection up to 3.2 Tbps included free on all server plans.

## Customer Support & Resources

- [Knowledge Base & Guides](https://cloudhoste.eu/knowledge-base-category.html): Comprehensive technical guides, cPanel tutorials, and DNS configuration documentation.
- [Service Reviews](https://cloudhoste.eu/review.html): Customer feedback and ratings.
- [Contact Support](https://my.cloudhoste.eu/contact.php): 24/7 technical help desk and live chat.
